message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'ipv4_change_dsfield' sets signal field 'iphdr.tos', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=iphdr;field=tos;offset=1] [oracle:assert=iphdr.tos stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets tos without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
